# Q6 values+list collect hosts/src ips per user (failed logon bruteforce)

**Dataset**: `gx_05_auth` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Failed-logon brute-force detection — count failures per source/account. Q6 values+list collect hosts/src ips per user.

```sql
dataset = gx_05_auth | filter outcome = "failure" | comp values(host) as hosts, list(src_ip) as src_ips, count() as failures by user | sort desc failures
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
